race.comment: ARISPHERE (2) loves this track and trip with three wins from four attempts and will strip fitter with that first-up run now under the belt. Gets some well-needed weight relief with the 2kg claim and should be right there at the business end. HEARTS ARE BETTER (1) just ran into one better in town last time out and is another to get some weight off. Sure to prove tough to hold out. The well-related HEART AND SPIRIT (8) (full to G1 winner Jonker) goes well for hoop Tierney who has a win and two placings from four steers. Top-three commodity. MISSILE ONE (9) has two wins and six placings from ten spins around this circuit and looks to be working up to another victory. One of the better hopes. BONFIRE SPARK (7) next in line despite the wide draw.
